name: sci-form
description: **High-performance 3D molecular conformer generation** using ETKDG distance geometry, written in Rust.

scripts.wasm:build: wasm-pack build crates/wasm --target web --out-dir ../../pkg && pnpm wasm:postbuild
scripts.wasm:build:node: wasm-pack build crates/wasm --target nodejs --out-dir ../../pkg-node && pnpm wasm:postbuild
scripts.wasm:build:all-alpha: wasm-pack build crates/wasm --target web --out-dir ../../pkg --features alpha-dynamics-live,alpha-dft,alpha-reaxff,alpha-mlff,alpha-obara-saika,alpha-cga,alpha-gsm,alpha-sdr,alpha-imd && pnpm wasm:postbuild
scripts.wasm:build:all-beta: wasm-pack build crates/wasm --target web --out-dir ../../pkg --features beta-kpm,beta-mbh,beta-randnla,beta-riemannian,beta-cpm && pnpm wasm:postbuild
scripts.wasm:build:full: wasm-pack build crates/wasm --target web --out-dir ../../pkg --features alpha-dynamics-live,alpha-dft,alpha-reaxff,alpha-mlff,alpha-obara-saika,alpha-cga,alpha-gsm,alpha-sdr,alpha-imd,beta-kpm,beta-mbh,beta-randnla,beta-riemannian,beta-cpm && pnpm wasm:postbuild
